_comment: - Vercel hosts the static site (public/) and API (api/) for free.
- The scraper still runs locally — Playwright cannot run in Vercel serverless.
- Workflow: run scraper locally → commit output/dispensary-prices.json → git push → Vercel auto-redeploys in ~30 seconds.
- To add nycweedprice.org: Vercel dashboard → Project Settings → Domains → add nycweedprice.org → follow DNS instructions.
- The Cloudflare Tunnel setup can coexist with Vercel — use whichever you prefer.
Vercel is better for reliability and uptime; Cloudflare Tunnel is fine for low traffic.
If running both, point nycweedprice.org at Vercel and keep the tunnel as a local fallback.
